history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, tousled hair is taking a mirror selfie. He is wearing a black suit jacket over a white collared shirt and a black tie. His left hand is in his hair, and his right hand is holding a smartphone, which is capturing the reflection. The phone's flash is very bright, creating a lens flare effect with streaks of light radiating outwards.

On the left side of the image, superimposed text reads: "NASTY BUT SHE FANCY, MONA LISA MASTER". The text is white with a subtle shadow. The background is dark and appears to be a room with some clutter visible on the right side, including what looks like clothes on a surface. The overall lighting is dramatic, with the strong flash illuminating the subject's face and upper body, while the rest of the scene fades into shadow. The color palette is dominated by blacks, whites, and grays, with the bright flash being the only significant source of light. The mood is somewhat edgy and confident, with a hint of mystery due to the low lighting and the superimposed text. The style is that of a casual, yet stylish, selfie.
